turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: hey whats going on ? how are you ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: not much , just seen both my children off to school , you ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: about to smash some pretzels . can't get enough of them .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: haha . i love it . my 2 cats are big pretzel lovers

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: so you have two cats ? what are their names ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: bobby and billie . i got them at the shelter i like to donate time to

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: oh cool . do you work ? any hobbies ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: my parents were both teachers , so i thought i might , but no

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i live with my mom and watch a lot star trek . ever seen it ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: my 2 children love that show , but i would rather be out hunting

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i'm a bow hunter when i'm not working on the railroad .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: we sound like we would get along

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: yeah i bet we would . i like hunting but i do not kill animals . i'm weird like that
